Copeley Capital's OnSight Industries recapitalized by Carousel Capital in Charlotte. OnSight serves new home, multi-family markets in Southeast and Texas.
news.summary: A company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, known as OnSight, has emerged as a prominent supplier of marketing signage and additional offerings to the new home and multi-family construction sectors in the Southeast and Texas regions. They cater to an expanding clientele of developers with their diverse range of products and services.

news.headline: GeneDx stock surged 42% post smashing Q4 expectations, reported on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Shares of GeneDx surged by over 40% on Tuesday following the biotech company's impressive fourth-quarter performance, which exceeded expectations. The strong showing propelled the stock to a significant increase in value.

news.headline: Namrata Dhanawade appointed Chief Applications Officer of SimplifyX™ effective January 1, 2025, bringing expertise in driving business value.
news.summary: Aurora, Illinois - Simplify Healthcare, a prominent enterprise SaaS solutions provider for Payers, has named Namrata Dhanawade as the Chief Applications Officer for SimplifyX™ starting January 1, 2025. Namrata, a key figure in Simplify Healthcare's evolution, is known for her exceptional skills and successful delivery of cutting-edge solutions. As Chief Applications Officer, Namrata will be responsible for steering the strategic growth and development of the company.

news.headline: Applications open for 2025 CPHYADV exam by ABQAURP for US-licensed physicians in Physician Advisor roles. Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In New Port Richey, Florida, on February 18, 2025, the American Board of Quality Assurance and Utilization Review Physicians (ABQAURP) has introduced the Advanced Physician Advisor Board Certification for US-licensed physicians working in Physician Advisor positions. This certification is now open to individuals across the United States.

Hartford HealthCare's Constitution Surgery Center East in Waterford, CT named among Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers in America.
news.summary: Avon, Connecticut - On February 18, 2025, Hartford HealthCare's Constitution Surgery Center East located in Waterford, CT, has been honored for its excellence in patient safety and quality of care. Recently recognized as one of America's Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers by Newsweek, CSCE stands out as a premier healthcare facility in the region. The center, which is jointly owned by Hartford HealthCare, has demonstrated exceptional standards that have earned it this prestigious accolade.

news.headline: California initiative improves maternal health & hypertension care, Dignity Health supports AHA to reduce mortality state-wide.
news.summary: Dignity Health has increased its backing for the American Heart Association's efforts to combat maternal mortality and uncontrolled hypertension across California. This move was announced on February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles. The American Heart Association, a prominent non-profit organization focused on public health, is at the forefront of these initiatives.

news.headline: James Hardie Building Products Inc. secures a six-year deal with David Weekley Homes, a major home builder in North America.
news.summary: The leading provider of home siding in North America has revealed a significant partnership with David Weekley Homes, one of the country's biggest privately owned home builders. Chicago-based James Hardie Building Products Inc. has secured a six-year deal with their North American counterpart. This collaboration marks a major milestone for the two companies and is expected to have a substantial impact on the industry. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025, via a press release from James Hardie.

news.headline: Double Eagle IV Midco, LLC has signed a definitive purchase agreement with Diamondback Energy, Inc. in Fort Worth, Texas.
news.summary: Double Eagle IV Midco, LLC, a company based in Fort Worth, Texas, has finalized a purchase agreement with Diamondback Energy, Inc.

news.headline: Watts Water Technologies to participate in two water systems symposiums; virtual presentation on Feb 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m.
news.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. made an announcement today regarding their participation in the Gabelli 35th Annual Pump, Valve & Water Systems Symposium. The event is scheduled for Thursday, February 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Key executives including Robert J. Pagano, Jr. (Chief Executive Officer & President), Shashank Patel (Chief Financial Officer), and Diane McClintock (Senior Vice President FP&A and Investor Relations) will be conducting virtual presentations and hosting 1x1 meetings during the symposium. This news comes as the company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WTS, seeks to engage with stakeholders and investors.

news.headline: Overtime partners with NWSL to provide exclusive content to fans, marking the company's first collaboration with a professional women's league.
news.summary: Fans of overtime will have the opportunity to experience the most sought-after moments of the NWSL in a new way. In an unprecedented move, Overtime and the National Women's Soccer League have revealed a groundbreaking content collaboration, marking the first partnership of its kind for the company with a professional women's league. The news was announced in Brooklyn, N.Y. on Feb. 18, 2025.

news.headline: ITG acquires PureRed, expanding globally, bringing Halo content model to North America. Enhances services, Content Marketing Platform.
news.summary: ITG has recently acquired PureRed, expanding its portfolio to offer AI-powered content solutions and a cutting-edge Content Marketing Platform on a global scale. Based in Birmingham, England, this move solidifies ITG's position as a front-runner in the industry. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025, marking a significant step forward for the company.

news.headline: US and Russia seek to mend relations as Ukraine is excluded from talks.
Deepgram reaches milestone in enterprise speech AI with text-free speech-to-speech model, paving way for natural voice interactions.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Deepgram, a prominent player in enterprise speech AI, unveiled a major breakthrough in speech-to-speech (STS) technology tailored for use in enterprises. The firm has achieved a noteworthy feat by creating a speech-to-speech model that functions without the need for text conversion at any phase, representing a crucial advancement towards creating comprehensive, contextualized speech AI systems. This progress paves the way for authentic and seamless voice interactions, setting a new standard in the industry.

news.headline: Wednesday FX Option Expiries
Scott Semmel is the new VP of payor relations at Acorn Health, promoting ABA therapy access for autistic children.
news.summary: Acorn Health, a top national provider of applied behavior analysis (ABA) for children with autism spectrum disorder (ASD), is pleased to announce the appointment of Scott Semmel as the Vice President of payor relations. In this new position, Semmel will spearhead Acorn Health's initiatives to strengthen collaborations with payors, state authorities, and lawmakers, aiming to broaden access to ABA therapy for children with ASD. The focus will be on advocating for improved access to crucial therapies for children with autism, making a significant impact on the sector.

news.headline: Kitron receives NOK 73 million order for JSM electronics from Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace.
news.summary: In recent news, Kitron has secured a significant contract worth approximately NOK 73 million. The agreement involves providing electronic components for the Joint Strike Missile (JSM), which is produced by Kongsberg Defence & Aerospace (KONGSBERG).

news.headline: US enters 'new era' of NATO, says Stent.
Kamlesh Korat named Inner Circle Lifetime member for data analytics expertise. Accolade announced on Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: In Warrenville, Illinois on February 18, 2025, Kamlesh Korat was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime member for his exceptional work in Driving Business Growth Through Data Analytics. Korat, a skilled professional in data analytics, has been acknowledged for his contributions to the field.

news.headline: Ian T. McGovern receives Inner Circle Lifetime membership for Global Healthcare Education contributions.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Woodbury, Connecticut, Ian T. McGovern was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime honoree for his significant contributions to Driving Innovation and Excellence in Global Healthcare Education. McGovern is dedicated to shaping the future of healthcare and education.

news.headline: Winnette Warren acknowledged as a Pinnacle Life Achiever in Anesthetic Nursing by The Inner Circle.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas on February 18, 2025, Winnette Warren was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Life Achiever for her significant contributions to Anesthetic Nursing. Warren's expertise and achievements in the medical care sector have solidified her reputation as a distinguished figure.

news.headline: Northgate González Market donates $239,425 to support Latino laborers and families affected by recent wildfires.
news.summary: In response to the destructive wildfires in Eaton Canyon and the Pacific Palisades, Northgate González Market in Anaheim, California offered assistance to the Latino community. This group accounts for almost half of the population in Los Angeles County. The wildfires caused significant damage, prompting the market to provide support to those affected. The Latino community, representing a substantial portion of the county's residents, benefitted from this outreach effort by Northgate González Market.

news.headline: Swaye for Music partners with Trebel to connect with superfans, launching a new platform to enhance artist-fan interactions.
news.summary: Fans of Swaye Artists are now able to engage with artists in deeper ways thanks to Swaye for Music. The platform, set to launch soon, allows superfans to enhance their connection with their favorite artists. This offering aims to provide a more meaningful and interactive experience for fans and artists alike. The company is based in Stamford, Conn. and Phoenix. The launch is scheduled for February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Altcoins like Dogecoin and Cardano may see a breakout as Bitcoin stays range-bound. Trader predicts altseason in 2025 cycle.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has been range-bound for several weeks, affecting altcoins' momentum. Traders suggest this consolidation phase may pave the way for an altseason breakout. Crypto analyst Astronomer advises patience, noting that major surges in altcoins typically occur in the final cycle year (2025). He compares the current cycle to 2017, where altcoins saw significant growth after a period of stagnation. In 2017, altcoins were flat until the final year, experiencing a surge from March to November. In contrast, 2021 saw an early surge from August 2020 to February 2021, followed by a 70% mid-cycle crash. Bitcoin's current price movement is likened to 2017's gradual rise, differing from 2021's rapid upward momentum. The historical performance of Dogecoin (DOGE) is also discussed in the full story.

news.headline: Bitcoin mining company MARA purchases a Texas wind farm to enhance operations, reusing old rigs in the process.
news.summary: A wind farm located in Texas has been incorporated by MARA into its Bitcoin mining activities. This move has allowed the company to repurpose outdated rigs, enhancing their operational efficiency.

news.headline: Press conference in D.C. on Feb 26 to urge border security funding and immigration reform. Over 10 million consequences discussed.
news.summary: On February 26, 2025, a gathering is scheduled in Washington, D.C., where sheriffs, state legislators, and citizens from various regions will convene to engage with Members of Congress. The focus of the meeting will be the impact of over 10 million instances that have affected their communities.

news.headline: Hamas rejects expulsion from Gaza and disarmament - Hamas Spokesman on Telegram.
Edmond's Honor Bourbon by Pronghorn honors Edmond Albius in Madagascar, rooted in purpose. Atlanta, Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Edmond's Honor is a unique brand that pays tribute to Edmond Albius, an unknown figure, by aging their product in cognac casks soaked in Madagascar vanilla extract. This brand aims to honor unsung pioneers in various fields like art, culinary arts, and mixology by infusing purpose into its business model. The product was launched on Feb. 18, 2025, in Atlanta. The brand's innovative approach aligns with its commitment to uplifting the next generation of creators and innovators.

news.headline: Dallas College to introduce Bachelor's degree in Software Development in Fall 2025, aiming to offer affordable pathway to high-paying careers.
news.summary: Dallas College has revealed the introduction of a Bachelor of Applied Technology program in Software Development, set to commence in the fall of 2025. This program aims to offer students a cost-effective route towards lucrative careers in the tech industry. The initiative caters to the increasing demand for skilled professionals in this field and seeks to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge to secure well-paying job opportunities.

news.headline: RoomPriceGenie gets $75 million investment from Five Elms Capital, appoints Chas Scarantino as CEO, aims for global growth.
news.summary: In Steinausen, Switzerland on February 18, 2025, RoomPriceGenie, a top provider of revenue management systems for independent hotels and groups, revealed a noteworthy investment. Five Elms Capital has committed $75 million USD to support RoomPriceGenie's global growth initiatives and enhance their services.

news.headline: NZ seasonally adjusted median house prices +1.1% YoY in January, -1% MoM - Reinz.
Solana suffers price drop due to decrease in onchain activity, declining DApps TVL, and upcoming SOL token unlocks.
news.summary: The value of Solana has sharply decreased due to a reduction in onchain activity, a decline in total value locked (TVL) for decentralized applications (DApps), and the upcoming release of a sizable number of SOL tokens.

news.headline: Global coffee machine market estimated to reach $15.1 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 3.5%, driven by smart tech and sustainability.
news.summary: Cutting-edge advancements in smart technology and a growing focus on sustainability are driving significant innovation in the worldwide coffee machine industry. A recent report by BCC Research projects that the "Global Market for Coffee Machines" will soar to an estimated value of $15.1 billion by 2029, experiencing a steady Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.5%. This indicates a promising trajectory for the sector as it capitalizes on evolving consumer preferences and technological capabilities.

news.headline: HitPaw to integrate DeepSeek AI into FotorPea for enhanced image generation, promising a more powerful AI experience.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming integration of DeepSeek AI into the HitPaw FotorPea platform, technology company HitPaw based in New York is aiming to enhance its AI-powered image generation tools. This integration will bring a significant boost to the functionality and advanced capabilities of FotorPea by leveraging the power of DeepSeek AI. Users can anticipate a more robust and sophisticated AI-driven image generation process, providing them with improved results and a more seamless experience when creating visuals. This update is scheduled to roll out soon, marking a significant advancement in HitPaw's technology offerings.

news.headline: Westwood One secures English-language audio rights for U.S. Soccer. #partnership #sports #broadcasting
Oxbridge Re Holdings & SurancePlus to speak at RWA DAY during ETHDenver 2025. CEO Jay Madhu will be featured speaker.
news.summary: In Grand Cayman on Feb. 18, 2025, Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: OXBR) and its subsidiary SurancePlus are leading the way in tokenizing Real-World Assets (RWAs), including reinsurance securities. They also offer reinsurance to property and casualty insurers in the US Gulf Coast region. CEO and Chairman Jay Madhu will be a keynote speaker at RWA DAY at ETHDenver 2025, a major event centered on RWA tokenization, moderated by Adam Blumberg.

Greystar's Marlowe Temecula, a new apartment community, is pre-leasing in Temecula, SoCal's wine country.

A special promotion allows guests to buy an Annual Pass and receive a free upgrade to the next tier for a limited time. This exciting opportunity comes as SeaWorld continues to innovate and enhance guest experiences. The offer is set to attract a significant number of visitors eager to explore the new exhibit.

Elevate announces new C-suite leadership: Kerry Miles as COO & Michael Bailey as CMO at Fort Worth, Texas-based credit provider.
news.summary: Fort Worth's credit solution provider, Elevate, recently made significant changes to its leadership team. Kerry Miles was promoted to Chief Operating Officer, while Michael Bailey was hired as the new Chief Marketing Officer. The company, known for its innovative online credit solutions, shared the news on Feb. 18, 2025. Elevate continues to strengthen its team with these strategic appointments.

news.headline: Ubee Interactive Holding Corp appoints Mr. Robert Mao as Chairman and Dr. Lin Yuan-Hao as Vice Chairman in leadership transition.
news.summary: In Zhubei City, Taiwan, on February 18, 2025, Ubee Interactive Holding Corp. appointed Mr. Robert Mao as the new Chairman and Dr. Lin Yuan-Hao as the Vice Chairman.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on February 18, 2025, Hoot Interactive unveiled a cutting-edge development in dynamic creative for OTT and CTV. This advancement allows brands to provide tailored advertising experiences.

Grayscale introduces Pyth fund for Solana ecosystem, providing increased growth exposure. #crypto #investment #Solana
news.summary: The fund asserted that it provides increased exposure to the growth of the Solana ecosystem with higher beta, as Grayscale steadily broadens its range of single-asset crypto funds.

news.headline: interCaribbean Airways introduces non-stop flights between San Juan, Puerto Rico (SJU) and Anguilla (AXA) starting April 14, 2025.
news.summary: A new route connecting San Juan, Puerto Rico (SJU) and Anguilla (AXA) is set to commence on Thursday, April 14, 2025, courtesy of interCaribbean Airways. The introduction of non-stop flights between the two destinations will enhance connectivity and facilitate easier travel for passengers. This announcement signifies a noteworthy development in air travel, with the inaugural flights poised to bolster transportation links between Puerto Rico and Anguilla. Travelers can look forward to seamless journeys and increased convenience with this new service.
